name: The Resurrection
description: A faction is attempting to resurrect a dead entity using forbidden rituals and stolen Engine technology. If they succeed, the boundary between life and death will collapse.
finaleDungeonFeel: Imperial wards flicker and die in a sealed vault of bronze and gold. The air tastes of ozone and grave-dust. At the center, a sarcophagus has been forced open from within, and something that should not breathe is drawing its first breath in centuries. The remaining wards scream in a language no living throat should know.

events.name: Grave Robberies Reported
events.description: Corpses are disappearing from cemeteries and battlefields across the Reach.

events.name: Ritual Supplies Traced
events.description: Black market merchants report bulk purchases of ward-breaking reagents.

events.name: Engine Power Surge
events.description: An ancient Engine has surged beyond safe output. The resonance matches no known pattern.

events.name: Forbidden Text Recovered
events.description: A copy of the Resurrection Rites has been found in a Bureau archive. It was supposed to be burned.

events.name: Wards Weakening
events.description: Imperial wards across the Reach are failing. Something is drawing their power.

events.name: Awakening Accelerates
events.description: The entity stirs. Those who sleep near the vault report dreams of a voice offering life beyond death.

events.name: The Entity Rises
events.description: The seal is broken. The dead thing breathes. A final expedition must bury it again.
